lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has noticeable scratches and several small dents. The interior shows moderate wear on the upholstery and carpet. All mechanical components are currently functional.
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior and interior show moderate wear and visible blemishes. Mechanical components are functional, though some parts may require maintenance or repair in the near future.

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior features a flawless factory finish with no chips or scratches, while the interior remains in showroom state, appearing and smelling like new with absolutely no wear on the upholstery. Mechanically, it is perfect, with all service records up to date and zero issues. This is a rare find for a collector or anyone seeking a car that looks and drives as if it just left the dealership.

Get ready for a reliable ride that’s ready for its next adventure! This car has been a dependable companion and shows some honest character from its time on the road. While it has some expected wear and tear, it remains a solid performer that gets the job done. Perfect for someone looking for a functional, budget-friendly vehicle with plenty of miles still to give!

This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, truly representing the pinnacle of its model year. Used car. Good condition. Reliable runner. Minor wear. Clean title.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, complemented by clean alloy wheels and tires with significant tread life remaining. Inside, the cabin is remarkably well-preserved; the upholstery is free of tears, and all dashboard controls and electronic features function flawlessly. Under the hood, the car has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, resulting in a smooth, quiet idle and responsive acceleration. While there are a few minor cosmetic stone chips consistent with careful road use, the overall presentation is sharp and professional. It has been a smoke-free, pet-free environment, ensuring a fresh interior for the next owner. This is a turn-key vehicle that has been cared for with an eye for detail, ready to provide many more miles of dependable service.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, characterized by its proven reliability and well-preserved aesthetics. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and consistent performance. Offering a refined driving experience and exceptional value, it stands as a testament to diligent ownership and remains a premier choice for the discerning motorist.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and sophisticated design. This unit has been subjected to a comprehensive professional evaluation to ensure it adheres to our rigorous standards of performance and safety. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust powertrain, this automobile offers a distinguished driving experience for the pragmatic professional. We invite you to experience the enduring quality and exceptional value inherent in this refined selection.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and it's been such a reliable companion! It's in really solid shape and has been well-cared for, making it perfect for someone who wants a great ride without the brand-new price tag. Everything runs smoothly, and it still looks fantastic cruising down the street. I’ve loved every mile in this beauty, and I’m sure you will too—come take it for a test drive and see for yourself!

Offering a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 straight-six engine equipped with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. This example utilizes a precise 6-speed Getrag manual transmission paired with a variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery. The chassis remains rigid with verified subframe integrity, supported by a factory-tuned MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive cooling system refresh and valve clearance adjustment, ensuring the engine pulls cleanly to its 8,000 RPM redline. A well-sorted performance machine for the discerning driver.
Used car. Good condition. Regularly maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of luxury and performance for its next owner. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of major blemishes, while the high-end infotainment system and climate control function flawlessly. It’s a turnkey vehicle ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately without the need for any upcoming maintenance.
